statement: In every magma, Equation 1936 (`x = (y * (y * y)) * (y * z)`) implies Equation 2218 (`x = ((y * z) * w) * (y * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0510
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op y y)) (op y z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) w) (op y y))
